findings.description: The DSCA inspector map URL in the footer appears as plain text in the HTML but is displayed as a hyperlink (blue, underlined) in the PDF.
findings.evidence: PDF footer shows 'https://deq.nc.gov/media/20408/download' as a clickable hyperlink. HTML footer renders it as plain text: 'The DSCA inspector map can be found at this address: https://deq.nc.gov/media/20408/download' without an <a href> wrapper.
